name: Cubiya
short_description: Cubiya is a 3D puzzle game, where you are asked to think around the box. You play as a small astronaut who is trying to rebuild a world. Run around chunks of the planet to find and build beacons, and reconnect the broken world. Explore different chunks of the world solving puzzles along the way.
detailed_description:
An Old School Puzzle With A Twist


Cubiya is a calming 3D puzzle game with a charming story and a soothing atmosphere.
With only you and the music, not a lot of distractions from solving the puzzles and building the plant.
A familiar mechanic, pushing a box, but with a literal twist... Rotate around the broken chunks to solve the puzzles. You and the box must twist your perspective to succeed in the game.
